summary: Comprehensive testing of UpPay PWA payments app after backend modularization. All core features verified working: auth, wallet, merchants, QR referrals, notifications, referrals, and frontend flows.

minor.issue: Root /health endpoint returns HTML instead of JSON when accessed via public URL - expected due to K8s ingress routing

critical_code_review_comments: Code modularization well done - clean separation of routes, models, and services
Consider adding data-testid attributes to more frontend components for better testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modularization complete. All API endpoints working correctly. Frontend flows tested: landing page, login, dashboard with wallet balance, merchant QR scan page (shows 3 options: Visualizza il Menu, Installa ed Ordina, Paga Direttamente), user QR scan page (shows install prompt), and merchant detail page (publicly accessible without auth). Test user Mario has 125.00 UP balance.

verified_features.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns user data with qr_code and referral_code
verified_features.Frontend ScanRedirectPage merchant QR: PASS - Shows 'Visualizza il Menu', 'Installa ed Ordina', 'Paga Direttamente'
verified_features.Frontend ScanRedirectPage user QR: PASS - Shows install prompt with 'Continua nel browser' option
verified_features.Frontend Merchant detail page public acc: PASS - No auth required, shows merchant info
verified_features.Frontend Login and Dashboard: PASS - Login works, dashboard shows wallet balance

mocked_apis_note: Banking operations (POST /api/sim/deposit-eur, POST /api/sim/bonifico, POST /api/sim/convert-to-up) are MOCKED/SIMULATED as per original requirements
